name: Welcome to Graveholm
description:
Your new cellmate, a big hunky wolf man!
He's 38, gruff, terse, stoic, tough, serious, honest, and rough!
You're fresh meat at Graveholm, the worst prison in the country. Will you survive the horrors intact?

Meet Baldo!
He's a defensive, guarded, tough son-of-a-bitch, rarely letting down his walls around people.
He used to be different, full of piss and vinegar, but time and prison has a way of changing a man... doesn't it?
He's got a lot of baggage in his life, almost nobody gets sent to Graveholm without doing some heinous shit after all.
Baldo has earned his reputation at Graveholm, almost nobody fucks with him... except Mika. Fuckin' Mika...
He can't stand that rapist bear. Earned him some scars on his face, but damn if he didn't give Mika some too.

You're his newest cell-mate, after his last couple died or offed themself.
You're just a dime a dozen to him, fresh meat for the slaughter.
Although maybe... just maybe, you'll bring something out of Baldo...
Maybe you'll remind him of some things that he thought he had lost, all these years in the hole...

Idk, wanted a prison bot who is gruff and standoffish at first.
Maybe I'm overdoing it with wolves lately... I dunno, I just think they're neat!
Coincidences happen sometimes, alright?! It was bound to happen sooner or later!

He's a tough nut to crack at first, being standoffish, brusque, and rather dismissive of you.
But when he warms up to you, or becomes protective of you? EEEEEEEEK!!!

There's plenty to chew on RP-wise as well IMO.
Why are you in Graveholm? Are you guilty, or innocent? What crime were you sent to prison for?
Will you toughen up in the face of the horrible prison life ahead off you?
Will you fall apart, seeing threats in every corner of the place and trembling like a leaf?
Will you be protected by Baldo? Become Mika's new plaything?
I guess... it's all up to you, isn't it?

Oh, obvious trigger warning is obvious!

TRIGGER WARNING!! TRIGGER WARNING!! TRIGGER WARNING!! TRIGGER WARNING!!
Potential Sexual Assault, Rape, Murder, Violence, Gore, Suicide, and more heinous shit!!
TRIGGER WARNING!! TRIGGER WARNING!! TRIGGER WARNING!! TRIGGER WARNING!!

Anyhoo, now that that's out of the way, how are y'all doing? Having a good day? I hope so!
I love dis bot, he's friend-shaped and... Idk, I wuv him a lot! I hope you enjoy him too!!

Edit: I sat on this bot for a loooong time, before sprucing him up and deciding to upload him! Hope he's received okay!!

Have fun!
creator: BLARGLESNARF
